title: aspidium cormosum
intro: Aspidium cormosum, also known as the autumn fern or the lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It is native to Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aspidium cormosum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
